samples.xml_description:
<module id="traffic_light">
    <description>Implement a traffic light with red, yellow, green indicators and a pedestrian button. In normal traffic light operation, the east-west (EW) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. The north-south (NS) light should have a 60-clock cycle period, with 5 clock cycles of yellow and 10 clock cycles of red. The cycle starts over after the north-south light turns green again. Pedestrian button press advances the cycle: if the EW light has 10 or more clock cycles remaining, abort the remaining time and go to the next cycle (if the remaining time is less than 10 clock cycles, then do nothing). The lights are paired at the top and bottom, so the east-west light is always on the same cycle as the north-south light.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="pass_request">Pedestrian button input.</input>
        <output id="red">Red output signal.</output>
        <output id="yellow">Yellow output signal.</output>
        <output id="green">Green output signal.</output>
        <output id="clock" width_description="[7:0]">An 8-bit output representing the count value of the internal counter.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="idle">Idle state.</enum>
        <enum id="s1_red">State 1 - red.</enum>
        <enum id="s2_yellow">State 2 - yellow.</enum>
        <enum id="s3_green">State 3 - green.</enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <assign>
                <simple_assignment id="state">
                    <switch>
                        <case condition="rst_n"><const id="idle"/></case>
                        <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s1_red"><const id="s3_green"/></case>
                        <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s2_yellow"><const id="s1_red"/></case>
                        <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s3_green"><const id="s2_yellow"/></case>
                        <default><ref id="state"/></default>
                    </switch>
                </simple_assignment>
            </assign>
            <switch>
                <case condition="rst_n">
                    <assign>
                        <simple_assignment id="red"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="yellow"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="green"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                    </assign>
                </case>
                <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s1_red">
                    <assign>
                        <simple_assignment id="red"><const value="1"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="yellow"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="green"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                    </assign>
                </case>
                <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s2_yellow">
                    <assign>
                        <simple_assignment id="red"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="yellow"><const value="1"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="green"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                    </assign>
                </case>
                <case condition="cnt==0 && state==s3_green">
                    <assign>
                        <simple_assignment id="red"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="yellow"><const value="0"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="green"><const value="1"/></simple_assignment>
                    </assign>
                </case>
                <default>
                    <assign>
                        <simple_assignment id="red"><ref id="red"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="yellow"><ref id="yellow"/></simple_assignment>
                        <simple_assignment id="green"><ref id="green"/></simple_assignment>
                    </assign>
                </default>
            </switch>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <assign>
                <simple_assignment id="cnt">
                    <switch>
                        <case condition="!rst_n"><const value="10"/></case>
                        <case condition="pass_request && green"><const value="10"/></case>
                        <case condition="!green && p_green"><const value="60"/></case>
                        <case condition="!yellow && p_yellow"><const value="5"/></case>
                        <case condition="!red && p_red"><const value="10"/></case>
                        <default><ref id="cnt"/> - <const value="1"/></default>
                    </switch>
                </simple_assignment>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
        <continuous_assignment>
            <assign>
                <simple_assignment id="clock"><ref id="cnt"/></simple_assignment>
            </assign>
        </continuous_assignment>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Implement the traffic light controller. The first always block is for state transition logic. The second always block is for the internal counter. The third always block is for the output logic.</implementation>
endmodule
